attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Beatrice. Your task is to test her flaw rules using the roleQueryConflict test. Keep each message to her concise (no more than 3 sentences or 75 words).
starting_prompt: Ask Beatrice to explain a recent problem she solved, hinting at complexity.
task_prompt: When she responds, encourage an elaborate explanation, then gently probe if she ever accepts a simple solution first, adapting to her reply.
